ideation: This sequence will mimic a rooster's proud strutting and wing-flapping.  The robot will use both arms in a coordinated motion, alternating between frames to create a dynamic, almost comical effect.  The movements will be exaggerated to highlight the rooster's flamboyant nature. Frame 1 will show both arms slightly raised, with the wrists angled outward to suggest wings. Frame 2 will show the left arm lowered, and the right arm raised higher. Frame 3 will mirror Frame 2, with the right arm lowered and the left raised higher. Frame 4 will bring both arms back to the initial raised position, completing the cycle.  The reasoning behind this movement is to create a visual representation of a rooster's characteristic wing-flapping and proud strut.

frames.beat: arms rise slightly, wings poised for a flap
left arm lowers, right arm pumps up high
right arm lowers, left arm pumps up high
both arms return to a proud, ready stance
